title: Software Update - Release Notes link
scenario: Release Notes popup does not display when tapping firmware version link in Device Settings > Software Update
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is not on the latest firmware (a firmware update is available).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. On the Home screen, tap the desired device to navigate to Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap Software Update.
5. Locate the blue firmware version text next to "Update Available" (this is the Release Notes link).
expected: A popup is displayed showing the release notes for the available firmware update.
